messages.message: I intend to hold both my armies in place for Spring 1901 to consolidate strength in Southern Europe. I suggest we coordinate our movements to avoid conflict and potentially support each other against Austria or Germany.

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!
I will not be making aggressive moves toward your territory in Spring 1901. If you'd like, we could discuss mutual non-aggression to stabilize Southern Europe.

Hi France,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?

Hello Russia!
As Turkey, I very much enjoy the R/T alliance, as I believe that if played correctly, it can be a very effective one that can steamroll through all of the other Eastern nations. Would you be down to try something like that with me?

Hi England,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?

Hello Austria!
I believe that our countries can have a very productive alliance. From what I have seen, the two of us have much to gain by working together. If you are willing to work with me against the Russian and Italian, I believe we can split the Balkans 50/50 and work together to prevent the Russian from growing quickly. What do you think?

Hello England!
Although our countries are a bit far apart, I believe we can still be of benefit to each other. Do you agree? I believe we should share information with each other about our common enemy: the Russian.

Hi Italy,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?

Hello Germany!
Although our countries are a bit far apart, I believe we can still be of benefit to each other. Do you agree? I believe we should share information with each other about our common enemy: the Russian.

Hello France!
Although our countries are a bit far apart, I believe we can still be of benefit to each other. Do you agree? I believe we should share information with each other about our common enemy: the Italian.

Hey Turkey, I'm actually more than happy with this, it's been my favourite alliance for a long time now. I would love to do a bounce in the black sea, do you have any other thoughts on how we should go about this year?

Hi Austria,
Just wanting to touch base and start some communication! What do you think about possibly working together this game?
Hey Italy, good luck this game! I appreciate the message, that sounds great. How do you feel about Dmzing Piedmont? I think we both have more important concerns at the start of the game.

Hello Italy!
As the two most Mediterranean countries on the board, we have much to gain by working together. I would be very much down for a I/T alliance. I believe the two of us could focus on Austria first, and then go on to Russia. What do you think?

Hey Germany! Good luck this game. I'd love to work together - I think it's usually a good alliance. If you're interested, I think we should DMZ Burgundy, and split Holland and Belgium. What do you think?

Hi Turkey,
Absolutely! You've got yourself a deal. Let me know how I can be of help to you.
Hey Turkey! Good luck this game. I agree, I think we can both benefit from information sharing. I haven't heard much yet, but will let you know if I hear anything. What have you heard?
Hey Austria, good luck this game!
Hey Russia, good luck this game!
I have no interest in conflict with your forces in the Mediterranean. If you'd like, we could establish peaceful coexistence in the region.
What are your relations like with England and France? I feel like an E/G alliance would be very strong.
Hey Turkey! Agreed, I think Austria/turkey can be a really fruitful partnership as long as we split the Balkans fairly. And definitely, I'd be happy to work with you to get rid of Russia quickly.
Hey England! Good luck this game. Any interest in working together?
Thanks France, good luck to you too.
Great! I can agree to that. Have you had much contact with England? I have not yet heard from them. How do you feel about Italy?
Hello Germany, I appreciate your message. I'm open to cooperation if it benefits both of us. However, I will need to see what your strategic goals are before we can discuss further.
How would you like to split the Balkans? Would you be down to take Serbia and Rumania?
Germany seems friendly, but I have not heard anything from England or Italy.

Hey Russia! Best of luck this game.

I've found in the past that Russia and Austria work really well together as long as they stay clear of one another. Would you like to form an alliance?
Hey France! Good luck to you as well. Have you heard from Italy yet?
I would like that very much. The Balkans seem very messy. Have you heard anything from Austria yet?
I agree that moving into Piedmont could be risky and unnecessary at this stage. Let's keep our focus on consolidation and mutual support against stronger threats.
Hey England! Best of luck to you this game. Have you heard from Russia yet?

Hey Austria! I'd love to have an alliance with you, but we must know one thing before we go on to the second year. I've been messaging everyone so far and I'm keeping things pretty quiet, this means I'm just bouncing black sea with Turkey, and getting into Rumania with my fleet. Would you be able to keep Galicia a DMZ? I think that's the best way to ensure peace between our nations, do you agree?
That sounds good to me. Have you heard anything from Austria or Germany?
Hey Germany! Definitely, we both have a lot more to gain from working together than working against one another. Have you heard from Russia or Italy yet?
I like the idea of an I/T alliance, especially focusing on Austria first. Let's discuss how we can coordinate our early moves to maximize our positions in Southern Europe.
Sounds good. Best of luck.
I've messaged Austria and Germany but heard nothing back yet.
Yes, I have. He wants to keep the peace with me in the early game, but hasn't really given me much information. What have you heard from him?
Yes, I agree about Galicia. Let's keep it clear of troops this turn. I will likely keep it clear as well, and it would be good to coordinate against Turkey.
Germany has been pretty friendly to me, Austria is saying that he would like to team up on you. I would recommend moving to Galicia if you haven't already.
I've messaged both of them, but neither have gotten back to me yet. You?
The same thing. I'm hoping we don't go after one another early on, but we will see.

Hi Germany,

Absolutely, I'd love to work with you in this game!

How do you feel about early-game play? Do you have a preference between the two of us and France?

Hey Germany, I have not spoken to England but I want to talk to you about Sweden. I would very much like to have Sweden this year, but I want to be friends with you. What do you say about me getting Sweden, and then we can be best of friends?
I agree, Germany seems friendly. Italy seems more cautious, not sure how they'll open. I haven't heard from England yet.

Greetings Austria,

I have not yet heard from Russia, have you?

Best of luck to you as well!

I haven’t heard back from Austria yet, but I remain open to their proposals. In the meantime, I believe we can begin planning our early moves against Austria. Perhaps we could support each other’s efforts to gain a foothold in the Balkans. What are your thoughts?
I haven't heard from England yet, but France seems like a very friendly player. He/she seems like they would be easy allies for you.
Not sure yet. What are your early game goals?
I agree with your approach. Let’s maintain our current positions and see if others push toward us. If Germany or Austria become aggressive, we can coordinate a response.
England hasn't messaged me at all, so I would not worry about them yet. Germany seems open to the idea of working with you, so I would not be worried about the East if I were you.
I'm not against you having Sweden. What would I get in exchange?
Agreed.
Perfect. I am hoping that we can both focus on the Turkish threat early on.
He seems pretty cautious so far, we'll have to see how the first few turns go

I appreciate your message. I remain open to a mutual non-aggression pact, especially since we both face potential threats from stronger powers. Let me know if you’d like to formalize such an arrangement.
Great! Yeah, we need to get rid of Turkey pretty early on.
We must unite in our pursuit of world dominance!
Sounds good
I've had the normal pleasantries with both, though I haven't heard from Italy yet. Russia seems a little demanding...
That is good to hear. From what I have seen, England hasn't messaged anyone, so they should be an easy target.

Greetings France,

Good luck to you too! What did you have in mind for a friendly working relationship?

My early game goals are to consolidate my position in Southern Europe and focus on stabilizing my borders. I prefer to avoid conflict unless necessary and would consider cooperation if it helps both of us neutralize larger threats like Austria or France.
Hmm... yes, Russia does seem to want a lot.
Thanks for the info, best of luck

Greetings Turkey,

I'm down for that! How do you feel about Russia? Any early thoughts?
Are you still interested in coordinating moves against Austria?
Interesting. I have spoken to both Germany and Austria, but they seem pretty friendly. Have you heard anything else about them?
How do you feel about Russia?

I appreciate your suggestion to focus on Turkey. However, I believe a more immediate threat comes from France or Germany. Let’s discuss how we might coordinate efforts against stronger powers while avoiding unnecessary conflict between ourselves.
I have now heard from Russia. I believe we have reached an agreement.

Greetings Italy,

Best of luck to you this game!
I haven't heard much from Russia yet. I'm waiting to hear back from him/her.
How have you two agreed? Have you decided upon a neutral/aggressor relationship?
Agreed. I’ll maintain my current positions and remain open to coordinating with you against any aggression from Germany or Austria.
Have you heard from Russia? Austria claims to have had contact with Russia but I don't know if that's true or not.
I think focusing on Austria early is wise. Let’s support each other’s moves in the Balkans and Mediterranean to push back against stronger players.

Yes, I’m still very interested in coordinating moves against Austria. I believe we can start by securing our regions and possibly supporting each other’s offensives into the Balkans. If you’re open to it, I’d suggest we plan mutual support this fall.
I’m maintaining my current positions as planned and remain open to coordination against Germany or Austria if they become aggressive. Let’s keep the lines of communication open.
Have you heard from them yet?
Nothing much from Austria. He/she seems like a friendly player. Germany has been a bit more talkative.
Yes, I have. I'm working on the assumption that Russia wants to come after me early, so you should be safe from him to your west.
I'm open to it. Have you spoken much with Austria or Turkey?
I was thinking of Dmzing the Channel, and working together against Germany. What do you think?

Greetings Russia,

Best of luck to you in this game!
Have you heard anything from France yet?
I have heard that Austria is wanting to go against Russia. I'm wondering if you have heard anything from France?
That sounds good. How are you feeling about Italy?
I have heard that Austria wants to go against Russia. Have you heard anything from Austria?
Russia is being extremely demanding, so I would be careful if you have an agreement with them. They may come after you in Scandinavia.
I'm down for a DMZ in the channel. What's your plan to go after Germany? Would you take the more obvious centers like Munich/belgium, and I could focus on Scandinavia?
I’m still considering our mutual non-aggression proposal. If you’re willing to focus on larger threats like Germany or Russia, I’d be happy to formalize an agreement.
Have you heard anything from Italy yet?
I heard the same thing. Austria has been making a lot of demands and wants me to stay out of his business...what do you think?
I'll try to stay as talkative as possible to Austria, hopefully we can get them to overextend.
That sounds good to me. Have you heard anything from Italy?

I haven’t heard anything concrete from France yet, but I believe they are also maintaining a cautious stance. I suggest we continue planning coordinated moves against Austria regardless, as they are a strong and immediate neighbor to both of us.

I appreciate the tip, let me know if I can help you out at any point.

Out of curiosity, what kind of demands is Russia asking?
I like that plan, sounds good. What have you heard from England/germany?
I think we have a mutual agreement to stay out of one another's business for the early game. I'm trying to see what he plans to do after grabbing Tunis.
I think that if you can convince Austria to move to Rumania in the Spring, you should have a much better chance at taking Sweden in the fall.

I’m still waiting to hear back from Turkey on their plans for Spring 1901. If you remain open to coordination, I’ll keep you updated on any developments and suggest we stay ready to respond to any aggression from Germany or Austria.
I think an agreement to focus on one another is the best. It's really difficult to coordinate against a common foe early on.
Have you heard anything from Austria?
I'm definitely open to that! What is your relationship with Austria and France?
Yeah that sounds good.
They want all of Scandinavia
Yeah Austria seems pretty hostile to me as well. I think we can definitely take him/her down quickly. I haven't heard much from Germany yet, how are you two getting along?
Sounds good.
Hey England, best of luck to you too!
I've been told Russia is looking to claim most of Scandinavia. Have you heard anything about that?
How do you feel about early-game play? Any specific thoughts you'd like to share?
And what are your thoughts on Russia? Have you been in contact with them?
I haven't heard anything from Turkey yet either. Will let you know if I do
I have heard that Russia wants to claim most of Scandinavia. Have you heard anything about that?
I remain open to the mutual non-aggression proposal, especially if we can focus on larger threats like Germany or Russia. Let me know if you’d like to formalize such an arrangement.
I haven't had much contact with Russia, but they seem pretty standard to me. I haven't said much, and they haven't said anything.
I'm good with that. If you do head east, let me know and I will see what I can do.
I have received conflicting reports from both Germany and England that Austria is going to attack Russia, while England says Austria wants to go for Russia.
No, I haven't heard anything from Italy.
No, but I'll ask Russia what their plan is. I'll let you know if I hear anything
Have you heard anything from Russia?
What's your plan for this game?
I haven't heard anything definitive from Russia either. If you're concerned about their movements, perhaps we could coordinate a cautious approach while focusing on stabilizing Southern Europe.
No, I have not. He/she seems like a very aggressive player, from what I have seen.
Are you friendly with Russia and Turkey?

I haven’t received any direct communication from Austria about Russia either. It’s possible the reports are speculative. Let’s continue planning our moves against Austria while keeping an eye on any shifts in Russia’s strategy.
I'm talking with Italy right now, and he/she seems interested in taking down Austria.
I’m still coordinating with Turkey and Austria on potential alliances against stronger powers. I’ll keep you informed of any developments and maintain our agreed-upon cautious stance.
Hey Austria, have you spoken to Italy?
I've heard from them since last night, and they have yet to respond to me. Do you think you might make a play for Warsaw?

I'm still holding steady with no immediate movements planned for Spring 1901. I believe it's wise for us to maintain our current positions and continue watching Germany and Austria closely. Let’s stay in touch about possible coordination if needed.
Hey Italy, what's your plan for this game?
Friendly enough with both, but it's too early to tell. Are you going to be headed south?
You've seen that player play before? What were the signs you noticed?

I’m optimistic about our plan to coordinate against Austria. Let’s plan to support each other’s moves in Fall 1901—perhaps I can support your push into the Balkans while you help me secure the Mediterranean.

I appreciate your continued openness to non-aggression. I’d like to clarify that if we’re both focused on larger threats like Germany or Russia, I’m more than willing to formalize a mutual non-aggression pact.
Survive the first couple of years. What about you?
Sounds good

I haven’t heard anything concrete from Russia either. It’s possible the reports are speculative. Let’s continue planning our moves against stronger neighbors like France or Germany while keeping an eye on Russia’s potential movements.
That's good to hear!
Haha sounds like a good plan.

I’m planning to consolidate my forces in Southern Europe this Spring to strengthen my position. I prefer diplomacy over conflict, so if you’re interested in cooperation or coordination, I’m open to hearing your thoughts.

I have heard that Russia and Turkey are coming after me, and I am fairly certain I can trust you. I am moving into the Balkans to get at least one build, but would be happy to coordinate if you want to head east.
I’m still coordinating with Austria on potential alliances, but our plan to push into Southern Europe together remains a priority. Let’s stay in touch about Fall 1901 moves.
I’m maintaining my cautious stance for Spring 1901 and coordinating with Turkey against stronger powers. I’ll keep you updated on developments and remain open to any coordination opportunities.
Austria and Turkey seem friendly, and if you let me have Sweden I'd like to have peace between us for a long time.

I appreciate your trust and your plan to move into the Balkans. I intend to hold my units steady this Spring to avoid provocation while focusing on consolidation. If you're moving into the Balkans, I suggest we coordinate to avoid overlap or conflict. Perhaps I can support your push indirectly from the south while you secure a foothold in the region.
I think that sounds good. Will you be heading to Tunis? If you do that, we can then focus on pushing into Turkey.
I love the french position, you always have so much power over the whole map.
It looks like Russia might be going after Germany first. Have you heard anything?
Russia said he's planning on going south... not sure if it means an alliance with Turkey, but it's something to watch out for
I think that sounds good. Have you heard from Germany? What are your plans for this turn?
Turkey is trying to set me up to move against you early. They want me to take Rumania.

I don't think so. I still have to talk to England and Germany, but it sounds like they both want to be friendly to me. I think I'm gonna wait to see how the board plays out before making any big moves
Makes sense to me. Have you heard anything about Italy's intentions?
Well I'm a little concerned about Austria, they seem like a nice guy but I'd much rather take down Austria before we turn on Turkey.
I haven't heard much. He said he's staying in Venice and Naples

Italy has told me that they are planning to stay friendly with me.

I am planning to move into Serbia and Greece for now. How do you feel about that?
Haha true
Interesting, they're trying to make me paranoid about you and Germany working together, saying you plan to take me down.
What's your plan for the unit in Venice?
Same here. How should we move forward this turn?
It might be worth a try.
Ok, Sweden is yours. Let's keep this as an alliance, and perhaps work together further in the game.
Ok, good to know. I appreciate the info.
Have you heard anything from Germany?
Nothing from Germany. You?
Awesome. Thank you so much.
I'm just going to do the standard opening, bounce the black sea and move my army into Ukraine.
What are your thoughts on England?
I've not heard much from England, but they always seem to try and make an early attack on Russia. I'm going to need to keep it cool with England for a while.
I've got a good alliance with Turkey for this year, but I'm not too sure about the alliance for long.
Thanks for letting me know. I don't know anything that would concern you but Austria told me that you were very demanding about Scandinavia.
If Germany doesn't show up, we'll be in prime position to split Germany down the middle
That's true.
Ok. You won't have any issues with me.
Nice.
Haha ok. Well I've got to deal with the southern sphere before I can even think about that.
Germany hasn't shown up yet, so this first turn is looking to be pretty standard.
Ok.
Why did you move to Bohemia?
So what happened to the DMZ?
Are you planning to attack me?
How are your feelings about Italy?
It looks like Germany is coming after me early. I will hold off Turkey as much as I can and I hope that we can still coordinate to take them out.

Hey, have you been able to make any diplomatic progress with France? I'm interested to hear what the board looks like to you.

I'm a bit curious as to why you let France into Burgundy.
We agreed to DMZ it...
Don't worry Austria, we've got this.
Did you guys Dmz the EC?
No, I'm not attacking you. Italy hadn't responded to me about Tyrolia and I wanted to protect Munich, so I wanted to be in a position to bounce you if you tried moving there from Venice.
Was the bounce in Black Sea planned?
What are your thoughts about Austria?
Well that's not entirely what the message I got from them was...

I’ve received word from Austria about their movement into the Balkans. I believe this could be an opportunity for us to support each other’s goals. I’ll remain cautious this Spring, but I suggest we plan coordinated moves for Fall 1901 to push into Southern Europe and the Balkans. What are your thoughts on a joint strategy?

I’ve been coordinating with Austria on potential moves into the Balkans. I still intend to maintain a cautious stance this Spring, but I wanted to update you in case Austria’s plans affect our region. I remain open to coordination against Germany or Austria if needed.

I see Austria's moves into the Balkans as a natural extension of their traditional influence, and I have no immediate interest in challenging them there. My focus remains on securing southern Europe and monitoring Turkey's aggressive expansion. I believe we can coexist peacefully as long as neither of us interferes with the other's strategic goals.

I’ve reviewed Turkey’s movements into BUL and CON, and I agree they appear overly ambitious. I suggest we coordinate closely in Fall 1901 to ensure Turkey doesn’t overextend. If Turkey moves toward VEN or ROM, I’m prepared to reinforce our positions and possibly support your advance into the Balkans.
That sounds good to me, I'm pretty concerned about a strong Russia. Do you think you can help me against Russia?

I appreciate your recent message. I believe Fall 1901 is the right time to act, and I’ll maintain a strong presence around NAP and ROM. If you’re willing to support our southern flank, I’d be open to a coordinated push into APU or TUS to apply pressure on Austria.
Also, what do you make of Russia's move to Galicia?

I appreciate your vigilance regarding Turkey’s moves. I suggest we coordinate a firm response in Fall 1901. If you move into BUL or ALB, I can reinforce VEN and ROM to secure our flank and possibly push into APU or TUS to apply pressure on Turkey’s southern front.
That sounds good to me. Do you think Russia's move to Galicia is a threat?
Sorry, I got paranoid and went back to move into Burgundy. I'll move out of it this turn.

I remain committed to our alliance, but I must emphasize the importance of securing southern supply centers like NAP and ROM. If you continue to push into the Balkans, I’ll need assurances that your expansion won’t threaten Italy’s interests directly.

I’ve noticed your movements into UKR and SEV. While my focus remains on Turkey and Austria, I’m always open to understanding your long-term goals. I hope our paths won’t cross in a way that creates unnecessary conflict.
What were you expecting from them?
That sounds good to me. I will be going for Greece this turn. How should we deal with Austria's threat to Trieste?

Regarding Austria's threat to Trieste, I believe we should monitor their moves closely but avoid direct confrontation unless they threaten our southern flank. I suggest you focus on Greece as planned while I reinforce around VEN and ROM to deter any Austrian push into our territory.
How do you want to deal with Austria's moves this turn?
I'm not sure Austria is going to make a move for Greece this turn. My moves are pretty set in stone, but I might not be able to take Greece. Are you going for Tunis this turn?
Russia's move into Galicia appears to be more of a distraction than a direct threat to us. I recommend we keep our focus on securing southern Europe and applying pressure to Austria.

Austria is consolidating in the Balkans, but I see little immediate threat to Germany. My focus remains on Turkey’s movements and securing southern supply centers. I believe we can maintain a stable balance if we avoid unnecessary conflict.
Ok, thanks!
Thanks, I appreciate the info. Good luck this turn

I appreciate your thoughts on Greece and Tunis. While I'm not targeting Tunis this turn, I remain focused on securing southern supply centers like NAP, ROM, and VEN to strengthen Italy’s position. If Austria makes moves toward Greece, I’ll be ready to support you indirectly by reinforcing our southern flank. Let’s monitor their actions closely.
Good luck this turn!

I’ve received Turkey’s latest message regarding Greece and Tunis. While I don’t plan to move into Tunis this turn, I’ll keep it in mind for future strategy. If Austria moves toward Greece, I’ll reinforce VEN and ROM to ensure Italy’s southern flank remains secure and possibly support your southern expansion.
No, it wasn't. It was a misunderstanding.
I agree. Let's continue to keep a close watch on the Austrian player.
So far so good. We've Dmzed Piedmont and the southern seas. What are you thinking?
Do you know why Russia moved into Livonia? That seems like an odd move to me.

I’ve noticed your continued movements into UKR and SEV, and while I remain focused on Turkey and Austria, I’ll monitor your actions closely. I hope we can avoid direct conflict, but I must prioritize securing southern Europe and maintaining a strong position around VEN and ROM.

I appreciate your agreement to monitor Austria closely. I intend to reinforce my positions around VEN and ROM this Fall to ensure we remain strong against any potential Austrian or Russian interference. If you notice any aggressive moves from Austria toward Greece or Bulgaria, please keep me informed—I’m ready to support our flank.
What are your plans for Belgium?
Also, what is your plan for your fleet in Livonia?

I’ve received Turkey’s message about monitoring Austria’s movements and wanted to reaffirm Italy’s readiness to support your southern front. If you move into BUL or ALB this Fall, I’ll reinforce VEN and ROM and possibly push into APU or TUS to apply pressure on Turkey’s flank.

I’ve noticed your continued movements into UKR and SEV. While I remain focused on securing southern Europe, I wanted to emphasize that I hope we can avoid direct conflict. If your path inevitably leads toward the Balkans, I’ll monitor your actions closely.
I can't do much against Russia right now, as Italy is going to take Greece and there isn't much I can do about it
I think they were expecting me to attack them
Oh I see. That's surprising.
I'll be moving into Greece

I appreciate your Fall movement plans into Greece. I will reinforce VEN and ROM to ensure our southern flank remains strong and am prepared to push into APU or TUS to support your southern strategy. Let’s keep coordinating closely to apply pressure on Turkey’s Balkan front.
Are you planning to take Greece this turn?
Sounds good.

Austria’s movement into Greece appears significant, and I intend to reinforce around VEN and ROM to deter any further aggression toward our southern flank. If you see an opportunity to respond to Austria’s moves from Bulgaria or Constantinople, I’m ready to support your strategy indirectly.
It looks like Austria will be able to take Greece this turn.
Are you planning to bounce Russia in Sweden?
I'm taking it. Would you like to work together against England?

I’ve noticed your continued expansion into UKR and SEV. While I remain focused on securing southern Europe, I’ll continue monitoring your movements closely to avoid any unexpected conflict. I hope we can maintain peaceful coexistence.
Yes, do you have an issue with that?
I have been talking with Italy, and it sounds like they are more worried about you than about Greece.

I do not plan to take Greece this turn, but I will reinforce my positions around VEN and ROM to ensure we remain strong against any further aggression toward our southern flank. If Austria moves aggressively toward Greece, I’m ready to support your strategy indirectly.
I appreciate your confirmation. I will reinforce VEN and ROM this Fall to ensure our southern flank remains strong and am prepared to push into APU or TUS to support your southern strategy.
Also, it looks like you can take Greece this turn, since it seems that Italy is going to Tunis.
I'm trying to figure out if Germany is trying to attack me or not. I don't think Italy is making any progress west.
If Austria’s move into Greece is successful, it could create an imbalance. I suggest we closely monitor their next steps and be ready to apply pressure on their southern front if needed.
I think I'll be safe, but I don't think I can trust Italy.
Nope

For now I'm just going to be holding Warsaw and taking Sweden. I'm going to try to avoid antagonising Germany and England, they don't seem very aggressive. I don't want to pick a fight right now, we've got a great opportunity to take down Austria. Are you able to support me into Rumania from Ukraine?
They may just be trying to deceive me, but I'll play it safe.
Yes, I think we can be good allies
Are you worried about Russia taking Rumania?
I haven't heard anything from them
Turkey is telling me that you are planning on taking Greece
I agree.
Yeah I wouldn't trust Italy either, we'll have to see how this goes.

I never indicated intentions to take Greece. Turkey appears to be spreading inaccurate information. My focus remains on securing southern Europe, particularly around NAP, ROM, and VEN. I am prepared to support your operations in Greece if needed.
Yeah, I think that I will need to keep bouncing in Black Sea. I don't think he will try to take Rumania though.
What are your plans?
I am planning to move to Serbia and Greece.

I suggest caution regarding false claims. I have no plans to take Greece this turn. My priority is maintaining strength around ROM and VEN while monitoring your aggressive moves into the Balkans. Let’s ensure our alliance remains grounded in mutual trust.
Have you heard anything from Germany?
Have you heard from Germany?
Ok, great. I'll build fleets next turn
Yeah, I am willing to support you into Rumania.
I think Italy is trying to play too many games
I have been talking to him, but he hasn't told me anything of particular interest yet.
I have no problem with that
I am worried about Italy attacking me
I just heard from him, he's worried about Italy.
Have you heard anything from Italy about Greece?
I don't think Italy will attack you, they seem to be really worried about France.
Do you know what they are planning to do with their fleet in the Ionian?
Italy's been playing a lot of games.
Turkey still believes that you are going after Greece.
Have you been talking to Germany at all? He/she seems pretty interested in an attack on France.
Sounds good
What are you going to do?
Are you going to take the Iberian Peninsula and then turn north?
I’ve noticed some confusion arising from Turkey’s recent statements. My focus remains on securing southern Europe, not engaging in the Balkans. I hope our paths remain clear and conflict-free.
Italy's fleet in Ionian Sea isn't going to take Greece, at least not this turn. I don't know what Italy plans to do afterwards.
Sounds good.
Also, I have heard Russia is going to be very focused on the North right now, I don't know what his/her fleet in Livonia is doing.
Are you going to take Greece?
How are you planning to move forward this turn?

I have not spoken directly to Germany about attacking France. My focus remains on securing southern Europe, particularly around NAP, ROM, and VEN. I suggest we continue monitoring Austria closely and ensure our southern flank remains strong against any aggression.

I’m aware Turkey believes false claims about my intentions regarding Greece. Let’s remain focused on coordinating against Turkey’s expansion into the Balkans. If they continue aggressive moves toward BUL or ALB, I’ll reinforce ROM and VEN and possibly push into APU or TUS to support your strategy.
Agreed.
Are you planning to move against Russia?

I appreciate your openness. My focus remains on securing southern Europe and monitoring Turkey’s expansion into the Balkans. I see no need for conflict with France or Austria at this time, and I believe we can maintain a stable balance if we avoid unnecessary provocations.
I'm surprised by the move to the Baltic. I don't think they're going to get Sweden this turn. Are you planning on attacking Russia?
Sounds good. Turkey wants me to move against Russia. Are you planning to move towards France?
I am going to be taking Greece, and I will also be moving to the Black Sea.
